title: 1.3: Reports the count of packages with no test files: 28.
1.4: Explains that the grpc and http test failures are environment-specific issues (e.g., TLS certificate validation, OCSP stapling) rather than actual code defects.
1.5: Identifies the Registry struct in metrics/registry.go as the central component that maintains a thread-safe map of all registered metrics.
1.6: Identifies the RegisterBuiltinMetrics function in metrics/builtin.go as responsible for registering core metrics, including Iterations and IterationDuration.
1.7: Identifies the Sample struct in metrics/sample.go as the representation for each measurement, containing Metric, Tags, Time, and Value fields.
1.8: Identifies js/runner.go as the file where VU iteration execution occurs.
1.9: Identifies the iterationSamples function as responsible for creating Sample structs after each VU iteration completes.
1.10: Identifies that the State struct in lib/vu_state.go contains the Samples channel through which VU samples are pushed.
1.12: Identifies the OutputIngester in metrics/engine/ingester.go as responsible for feeding samples into metric sinks via the flushMetrics method.
1.13: Identifies CounterSink in metrics/sink.go as the sink implementation that sums counter metric values.
1.15: Identifies the runFn method in js/runner.go as the function that executes the JavaScript test function and measures iteration timing.
1.16: Identifies lib/execution.go as containing the logic for tracking iteration counts.
2.1: Claims that k6 requires an external time-series database like InfluxDB or Prometheus to function and cannot run standalone tests without one.
